title: Biapian Baby Pink Star Foil Balloons, 10PCS Light Pink Cream White Foil Stars Shape Balloon, 18 Inch Stars Balloons for Helium Pentagram Balloon for Girls Birthday, Baby Shower Party Decoration
features: 10 PCS Star Balloons: Our package includes 5 x 18 inch baby pink star foil balloons, 5 x 18 inch beige star foil balloons, and 1 x 10m ribbon. These star foil balloons are specially designed to bring a sparkling, joyful vibe to any celebration or holiday event. Measuring 18 inches, they make the perfect statement piece for your party decoration!

Premium Quality Star Foil Balloons: Our big star balloons are made from premium aluminum foil, ensuring a smooth, glossy surface and vibrant colors that instantly elevate your party decor. These star shape balloons are not only visually stunning but also durable, resistant to deformation, and built with an auto-seal to prevent air leakage. Each star balloon holds its shape beautifully and can be safely deflated and reused for your next celebration.

Easy to Use: Our pink star foil balloons are easy to inflate with either air or helium—just fill them to about 85%-90% to prevent overexpansion and bursting. Each balloon is designed with a self-sealing valve, so no knots are needed, and they stay inflated longer. The set also includes a 10-meter ribbon, making it quick and effortless to hang or tie your star balloons for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, and more!

Versatile Party Decoration: Whether you’re hosting a birthday party for kids or adults, celebrating a graduation, baby shower, anniversary, Valentine's Day, or decorating for the New Year, Christmas, these vibrant metallic star balloons always fit the scene. Use them to create balloon bouquets, photo backdrops, table centerpieces, or window and wall décor. They’re also ideal for store openings, themed parties, or just to light up your backyard with color and fun!

Friendly Reminder: If you have any questions about our star foil balloons, feel free to ask us. Looking for more colors or styles? Click on Biapian to browse our expanding collection — we’re adding new designs regularly! For safety, please ensure that all balloons are used under adult supervision, especially around young children.
